zh.Great Budworth, Cheshire, England: 英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Katherine Dutton於1506年出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，她的父親Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton23歲，母親Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall26歲。她與Richard Grosvenor在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個女兒的父母。她去世於1579年9月16日在英國爾艾克斯頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾。

zh-hans.Great Budworth, Cheshire, England: 英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Katherine Dutton于1506年出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，她的父亲Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton23岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall26岁。她与Richard Grosvenor在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是7个女儿的父母。她去世于1579年9月16日在英国爾艾克斯頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Katherine Dutton was born in 1506, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton, was 23 and her mother, Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall, was 26. She married Richard Grosvenor in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 daughters. She died on 16 September 1579, in Eccleston, Cheshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Katherine Dutton est née en 1506, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Grosvenor à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 septembre 1579, à Eccleston, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Katherine Dutton 1506 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton 23 und ihre Mutter Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall 26. Sie hat in England, United Kingdom Richard Grosvenor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. September 1579 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Eccleston, Cheshire, England und wurde in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ht.Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Dutton è nata il nel 1506 nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Richard Grosvenor nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1579, nel Eccleston, Cheshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Duttonが1506年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Duttonは23歳，母Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hallは26歳であった。イギリスイギリスでRichard Grosvenorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1579年9月16日にイギリスチェシュアイアエククレストンで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Dutton(이)가 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Grosvenor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1579년 9월 16일 영국 체실르 c클스턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Dutton nasceu em 1506, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Grosvenor em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1579, em Eccleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Katherine Dutton родилась в 1506 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Grosvenor в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 дочерей. Она умерла 16 сентября 1579 г. в местности экклестон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Katherine Dutton nació en 1506, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Richard Grosvenor en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1579, en Eccleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
